name: ordered-explorer
description: A native-looking workspace explorer with authoritative custom file ordering stored in .code-workspace settings.

viewsWelcome.contents:
Open a folder or a `.code-workspace` file to use Ordered Explorer.
[Open Folder](command:vscode.openFolder)

view/item/context.when: view == orderedExplorer.files && (viewItem == orderedExplorer.file || viewItem == orderedExplorer.folder || viewItem == orderedExplorer.root) && config.orderedExplorer.contextMenu.useSubmenus && !config.orderedExplorer.contextMenu.useEmojiTitles

orderedExplorer.order.description: Authoritative final order for direct children of a single workspace root. Use * for all unlisted entries. In multi-root workspaces, use orderedExplorer.roots.
orderedExplorer.order.markdownDescription: Authoritative final order for direct children of a single workspace root. Use `*` for all unlisted entries.

orderedExplorer.directoryOrder.description: Authoritative final orders for nested directories. Keys are POSIX-style paths relative to the workspace root.
orderedExplorer.directoryOrder.markdownDescription: Authoritative final orders for nested directories. Keys are POSIX-style paths relative to the workspace root.

orderedExplorer.roots.description: Per-root ordering for multi-root workspaces, keyed by workspace-folder name.
orderedExplorer.roots.markdownDescription: Per-root ordering for multi-root workspaces, keyed by workspace-folder name.

orderedExplorer.fallbackSort.description: Sorting applied only to entries represented by * or otherwise unlisted.
orderedExplorer.fallbackSort.markdownDescription: Sorting applied only to entries represented by `*` or otherwise unlisted.
enumDescriptions: Folders first, then files, using natural name sorting.
Files and folders mixed together using natural name sorting.
Files first, then folders, using natural name sorting.
Sort by file extension/type, then by name.

orderedExplorer.autoReveal.description: Reveal the active editor file in Ordered Explorer.
orderedExplorer.autoReveal.markdownDescription: Reveal the active editor file while the Ordered Explorer view is already visible.

orderedExplorer.showExcludedFiles.markdownDescription: Show files and folders excluded by the built-in `files.exclude` setting.

orderedExplorer.followSymlinks.description: Allow expanding directory symbolic links. Disabled by default to prevent recursive loops.
orderedExplorer.followSymlinks.markdownDescription: Allow expanding directory symbolic links. Disabled by default to reduce recursive-loop risk.

orderedExplorer.confirmTrashDelete.description: Ask for confirmation before moving resources to Trash. The confirmation dialog can disable future prompts.
orderedExplorer.confirmTrashDelete.markdownDescription: Ask for confirmation before moving resources to Trash. The dialog can disable future prompts.

orderedExplorer.confirmPermanentDelete.description: Ask for confirmation before permanently deleting resources. The confirmation dialog can disable future prompts.
orderedExplorer.confirmPermanentDelete.markdownDescription: Ask for confirmation before permanently deleting resources. The dialog can disable future prompts.

orderedExplorer.confirmDelete.description: Legacy shared delete-confirmation setting. Use the separate Trash and permanent-delete settings instead.
orderedExplorer.confirmDelete.markdownDescription: Deprecated shared delete-confirmation setting. Use the separate Trash and permanent-delete settings instead.

orderedExplorer.contextMenu.useSubmenus.description: Group related Ordered Explorer right-click actions into Open In, Clipboard, and Order submenus.
orderedExplorer.contextMenu.useSubmenus.markdownDescription: Group related Ordered Explorer right-click actions into native submenus.

orderedExplorer.contextMenu.useEmojiTitl.description: Prefix Ordered Explorer right-click menu and submenu titles with emoji symbols. Disable for plain text labels.
orderedExplorer.contextMenu.useEmojiTitl.markdownDescription: Prefix Ordered Explorer right-click menu and submenu titles with emoji symbols.

scripts.vscode:prepublish: npm run check-types && npm run test && npm run compile
scripts.test:integration: npm run compile && xvfb-run -a node runIntegrationTests.mjs
